articles.title: Read the Supreme Court Decision in the Birthright Citizenship Case
articles.abstract: In the citizenship case, the justices voted 6-3, with the liberals in dissent, to limit the lower-courts’ preliminary injunctions to each plaintiff with standing to sue. The majority stressed that it is not addressing the merits of Trump’s attempt to end automatic citizenship for babies born on U.S. soil to undocumented migrants and foreign visitors without green cards.
articles.snippet: In the citizenship case, the justices voted 6-3, with the liberals in dissent, to limit the lower-courts’ preliminary injunctions to each plaintiff with standing to sue. The majority stressed that it is not addressing the merits of Trump’s attempt to end automatic citizenship for babies born on U.S. soil to undocumented migrants and foreign visitors without green cards.

articles.abstract: In a 220-page report to FEMA last year, Kerr County said a flood was likely within a year, and could exceed historical records.

articles.title: Want to Put a Price Tag on Nature? Ask an Economist.
articles.abstract: Three new books apply an economist’s lens — and language — to some of our most unruly phenomena, including war and nature itself.
articles.snippet: Three new books apply an economist’s lens — and language — to some of our most unruly phenomena, including war and nature itself.

ON NATURAL CAPITAL: The Value of the World Around Us (Book)

articles.title: I Saw a Child Who Seemed Neglected. Should I Have Done Something?
articles.abstract: I worry that I’m piling assumptions onto a family I know nothing about, a family that might be doing its best.

articles.title: Could a Supreme Court Case Help Hunter Biden Get His Law License Back?
articles.abstract: The former president’s son says he is watching closely as the justices on Monday hear a case testing the constitutionality of the federal gun law used to convict him.
articles.snippet: The former president’s son says he is watching closely as the justices on Monday hear a case testing the constitutionality of the federal gun law used to convict him.

articles.title: Has Trump Thrown the Democrats a Lifesaver?
articles.abstract: The president appears determined to prevent his party from achieving a durable majority coalition.

articles.title: Welcome to Wyoming, the Frontier of America’s New Gilded Age
articles.abstract: Jackson, Wyo., has long been a refuge for the rich. But the last five years saw a boom in wealth of a kind never before seen. Across the country, the 2017 tax cuts minted hundreds of new billionaires.
articles.snippet: Jackson, Wyo., has long been a refuge for the rich. But the last five years saw a boom in wealth of a kind never before seen. Across the country, the 2017 tax cuts minted hundreds of new billionaires.
articles.byline: By Katie Benner, Steven Rich, Mike Baker, John Branch and Will Warasila

articles.title: Ed Crane, Who Built Cato Into Libertarian Stronghold, Dies at 81
articles.abstract: Starting with $500,000 in seed money from Charles Koch, Mr. Crane made the institute the nation’s pre-eminent libertarian think tank.
articles.snippet: Starting with $500,000 in seed money from Charles Koch, Mr. Crane made the institute the nation’s pre-eminent libertarian think tank.
